data.body: PASS 1 review (T5c Security overlay): PASS — not applicable. This plan moves internal reconciler coordination state (`.bridge_state/bindings.json`, `.reconciler-pass-lock`, `.reconciler-phase-gate`) off the shared `tickets` git branch into gitignored local state for a local git-backed CLI tool. It introduces no new network endpoint, authn/authz boundary, PII, credential, secret, or sensitive-data storage/transmission surface. The lock/gate files hold only pass_id + timestamps + mode names (operational metadata); the existing push path is best-effort to an already-configured origin remote with no new grants. The advisory-lock ownership check is cooperative coordination, not a security boundary. No T5c findings.
